patches.find: The model has at least these undisclosed parameters:
patches.replace: The model has at least these parameters that are fitted to observations rather than derived from dome geometry:
patches.rationale: SEC-6.1-params.c2 review (hole 3+4): the 26% aetheric damping and NMP deceleration constants are openly published on dome site, not undisclosed. Calling them undisclosed is factually wrong and a dome defender would immediately use this. Reframed as empirically fitted without dome-geometry derivation.
